Review: This laptop is incredibly fast, I can run multiple applications without any lag.
The screen resolution is stunning, colors are vivid and crisp.
Battery barely lasts 2 hours, very disappointing for a premium laptop.
Keyboard feels cheap and the keys are too mushy for comfortable typing.
Perfect for gaming! Runs AAA titles at max settings without breaking a sweat.
The trackpad is unresponsive and frustrating to use.
Great value for money, does everything I need for work and school.
It overheats constantly and the fan noise is unbearable.
Sleek design and lightweight, easy to carry around all day.
Camera quality is mediocre, not great for video calls.
Setup was super easy, had it running in under 10 minutes.
Customer service was unhelpful when I reported a defective charger.
The speakers are surprisingly loud and clear for a laptop this thin.
Mine arrived with a dead pixel in the center of the screen.
Solid build quality, feels premium and durable.
Software bloatware everywhere, took an hour to clean it up.
Best laptop I've ever owned, hands down.
It crashed three times in the first week. Returning it.
The fingerprint sensor works flawlessly every single time.
Average performance, nothing special but gets the job done.
WiFi connectivity is spotty, keeps dropping randomly.
Upgraded from my old machine and the difference is night and day!
The hinge feels flimsy, worried it won't last a year.
Runs completely silent during normal use. Love it.
Not worth the price tag. You can get better specs for less.
